explanation: I've created a dashboard showing your Freshcaller activity for today. This includes the total number of calls placed and received today, plus a breakdown of call statuses and details of your most recent calls.

widgets.title: Today's Freshcaller Activity
widgets.subtitle: Live call volume and status overview

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Monitor call completion rates to identify potential connectivity issues or customer satisfaction patterns.

quickActions.label: Add Call Duration Analysis
quickActions.prompt: Add a chart showing average call duration by status

quickActions.label: Show Support Tickets Too
quickActions.prompt: Add today's Freshdesk ticket count alongside the calls

quickActions.label: Create Weekly Call Trend
quickActions.prompt: Show me call volume trends over the past week

issues.message: Using 'sum' aggregation on 'count' field is acceptable but redundant. The freshcaller_calls_by_status source already provides pre-aggregated counts by status. Consider using 'sum' only if raw event-level data exists, otherwise a direct grouping without aggregation would be more efficient.
